meta.title: DNA Base Composition of Rickettsia tsutsugamushi Determined by Reversed-Phase High-Performance Liquid Chromatography
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: The DNA base composition of Rickettsia tsutsugamushi was determined by reversed-phase high-performance liquid chromatography and compared with that of Rickettsia rickettsii. The G+C contents were 28.1 to 30.5 mol% for R. tsutsugamushi and 32.1 mol% for R. rickettsii.
